name: @pixelrpg/mcp-bridge
description: MCP↔D-Bus bridge: lets an AI agent inspect, drive and screenshot the running PixelRPG Maker over its org.pixelrpg.maker D-Bus surface. Dev tool, runs as a GJS bundle via gjsify.

scripts.build:app: gjsify build src/index.ts --app gjs --globals auto --shebang --outfile dist/mcp-bridge.gjs.mjs

author: Pascal Garber <pascal@artandcode.studio>
